definitions.text: In an uncertain or unspecified location.
examples: I must have left my glasses somewhere.
I've hidden candy somewhere in this room.

definitions.text: To an uncertain or unspecified location.
examples: He plans to go somewhere warm for his vacation.
I have to go somewhere at lunch. Can I meet you at 2?
I don't remember the exact number, but it was somewhere between 200 and 300.

definitions.text: Unspecified or unknown (unlocated) place or location.
A person with strong cultural or social ties that are exclusive to a specific place.
